added_items.final_wording: Identifies severity-risk contexts and distinguishes uncomplicated common cold from other respiratory presentations.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Common Cold
source.population: Adults and children with common cold; severity caveats for neonates, older people, and long-term conditions.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for common-cold telehealth documentation; only partial for the broader fever/URTI baseline workflow.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Identifies severity-risk contexts and distinguishes uncomplicated common cold from other respiratory presentations.

added_items.rationale: The reviewed 1. Background section is directly relevant to documenting Fever, subject to the recorded population and setting limitations.
